name: State of Somaliland (1960)

colors.symbolism: the field, recalling the United Nations and the pan-Somali blue

description: A light-blue field charged with a centred white five-pointed star.
history: Flag of the State of Somaliland, the briefly independent state formed when the British Somaliland Protectorate gained independence on 26 June 1960. It adopted a light-blue flag with a white star similar to that of the Italian-administered Trust Territory of Somaliland. After only five days, on 1 July 1960, it united with the Trust Territory to form the Somali Republic.
